prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fantasy sci-fi portrait of TERRA, a serene and elegant young man representing a geologic archive. He has tousled, voluminous white silver curly hair, warm tan skin, soft golden-brown eyes, a gentle knowing smile, and delicate dangling earrings. He stands in a dark star-filled holographic observatory, facing the viewer in a relaxed three-quarter pose, one hand in his trouser pocket and the other hand held outward, levitating a luminous transparent Earth globe above his palm. The Earth should show the Americas, glowing city-like networks, fine latitude-longitude grid lines, orbit rings, and pale blue-white atmospheric light. Dress him in ornate dark emerald and black aristocratic clothing: glossy long cape or robe, layered high-collar shirt, brown fitted vest, white trousers, black belt, gold chains, gemstone pendants, leaf-shaped brooches, compass and astrolabe motifs, starburst pins, and many tiny sparkling metallic details. Surround him with exactly 8 holographic interface elements: 1 large title panel reading "TERRA" with smaller text "geologic archive" and "ver. 1.0" plus a compass icon; 1 upper-left panel labeled "STRATA ANALYSIS" with layered geological charts; 1 mid-left panel labeled "MINERAL COMPOSITION" with a crystalline rock diagram and data list; 1 lower-left panel labeled "TECTONIC ACTIVITY" with a world map and waveform graph; 1 partially visible bottom-left technical graph panel; 1 upper-right circular planetary analysis panel with concentric rings; 1 small right-side line graph panel; and 1 right-lower botanical/geologic data panel with a plant-like diagram. Use a black cosmic background filled with golden grid lines, star particles, constellation-like dots, transparent rectangular HUD frames, orbital diagrams, and fine scientific annotations. The mood is calm, noble, and awe-inspiring, like an immortal planetary archivist. Visual style: ultra-detailed Japanese anime illustration, luminous gold and teal highlights, intricate linework, painterly rendering, dramatic rim light on the white hair and shoulders, high contrast, cinematic composition, 3:4 vertical canvas. Keep the interface text minimal and mostly decorative except for the specified readable labels. No watermark, no logo, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fantasy sci-fi portrait of TERRA, a serene and elegant young man representing a geologic archive. He has tousled, voluminous white silver curly hair, warm tan skin, soft golden-brown eyes, a gentle knowing smile, and delicate dangling earrings. He stands in a dark star-filled holographic observatory, facing the viewer in a relaxed three-quarter pose, one hand in his trouser pocket and the other hand held outward, levitating a luminous transparent Earth globe above his palm. The Earth should show the Americas, glowing city-like networks, fine latitude-longitude grid lines, orbit rings, and pale blue-white atmospheric light. Dress him in ornate dark emerald and black aristocratic clothing: glossy long cape or robe, layered high-collar shirt, brown fitted vest, white trousers, black belt, gold chains, gemstone pendants, leaf-shaped brooches, compass and astrolabe motifs, starburst pins, and many tiny sparkling metallic details. Surround him with exactly 8 holographic interface elements: 1 large title panel reading "TERRA" with smaller text "geologic archive" and "ver. 1.0" plus a compass icon; 1 upper-left panel labeled "STRATA ANALYSIS" with layered geological charts; 1 mid-left panel labeled "MINERAL COMPOSITION" with a crystalline rock diagram and data list; 1 lower-left panel labeled "TECTONIC ACTIVITY" with a world map and waveform graph; 1 partially visible bottom-left technical graph panel; 1 upper-right circular planetary analysis panel with concentric rings; 1 small right-side line graph panel; and 1 right-lower botanical/geologic data panel with a plant-like diagram. Use a black cosmic background filled with golden grid lines, star particles, constellation-like dots, transparent rectangular HUD frames, orbital diagrams, and fine scientific annotations. The mood is calm, noble, and awe-inspiring, like an immortal planetary archivist. Visual style: ultra-detailed Japanese anime illustration, luminous gold and teal highlights, intricate linework, painterly rendering, dramatic rim light on the white hair and shoulders, high contrast, cinematic composition, 3:4 vertical canvas. Keep the interface text minimal and mostly decorative except for the specified readable labels. No watermark, no logo, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张高度精细的竖版动漫奇幻科幻肖像，主角是 TERRA，一位代表地质档案的沉稳优雅的年轻男子。他留着蓬松且富有质感的 银白色 卷发，拥有温暖的古铜色皮肤、柔和的金棕色双眸、温和而睿智的微笑，并佩戴着精致的垂坠耳环。他站在黑暗且星光璀璨的全息观测台内，以放松的三分之二侧身姿态面向观众，一只手插在裤兜里，另一只手向外伸展，掌心上方悬浮着一个发光的透明地球仪。地球仪应展示美洲大陆、发光的城市网络、精细的经纬网格线、轨道环以及淡蓝白色的大气光晕。为他穿上华丽的深祖母绿与黑色贵族服饰：光泽感长斗篷或长袍、叠层高领衬衫、棕色修身马甲、白色长裤、黑色腰带，并搭配金链、宝石吊坠、叶形胸针、罗盘与星盘图案、星芒别针以及许多细小的闪亮金属细节。在他周围环绕 8 个全息界面元素：1 个大型标题面板，写有“TERRA”，下方附有较小的文字“geologic archive”和“ver. 1.0”以及一个罗盘图标；1 个左上方面板，标注为“STRATA ANALYSIS”，包含分层地质图表；1 个左侧中间面板，标注为“MINERAL COMPOSITION”，包含晶体岩石图和数据列表；1 个左下方面板，标注为“TECTONIC ACTIVITY”，包含世界地图和波形图；1 个部分可见的左下方技术图表；1 个右上方的圆形行星分析面板，带有同心圆；1 个右侧小型折线图面板；以及 1 个右下方植物/地质数据面板，包含类似植物的图表。背景使用黑色宇宙空间，布满金色网格线、星尘、星座般的点阵、透明矩形 HUD 框、轨道图以及精细的科学注释。氛围宁静、高贵且令人敬畏，宛如一位永恒的行星档案管理员。视觉风格：超精细日本动漫插画，明亮的金色与青色高光，复杂的线条，绘画感渲染，白发与肩部的戏剧性轮廓光，高对比度，电影级构图，3:4 竖向画布。保持界面文字简洁且主要作为装饰，仅保留指定的易读标签。无水印，无 Logo，无多余字符。
